name: agent-sdlc
description: A full-SDLC pipeline for AI coding agents: idea -> acceptance criteria -> architecture -> techstack -> atomic task plan -> readiness gate -> test-first subagent-driven build -> reviewed PR. Run the whole chain or invoke any stage standalone, resolving its input from any source (prompt, doc, Linear, repo) without weakening the gate or traceability. A dependency-free, hardened enforcement-spine checker (sdlc-check, bare node) verifies the pipeline's mechanically-decidable promises — trace integrity, bidirectional coverage, symmetric dangling-component detection, anchored component resolution, recorded-commit ledger/git correspondence (existence + reachability + subject scope), green-bar evidence, and the terminal AC->proof map at ship — never throwing on ragged input; gate/build/ship invoke it fail-closed with an announced degraded fallback, and its grammar is documented in the stage skills. The build conductor pins its subagent roster, carries a subagent-death policy, and runs a baseline green-bar runnability diagnostic; structured 'outside the checker' declarations make non-numbered external components resolvable by the checker. Plus skills for writing the project README and full repository documentation.
